source_desc: A Human Level SEO blog article explaining how to mark up products with microdata.
notes: Instructive mixed case: the page's live microdata is only Blog + CreativeWork (the blog chrome), using https://schema.org/. The article body also contains many HTML-ESCAPED example snippets referencing http://schema.org/Product, Offer, Brand, AggregateRating, Rating and Review - these appear in the raw bytes but are NOT live attributes. Good for testing that an extractor ignores escaped code samples while still capturing the real Blog/CreativeWork items.
